title: not_found.jar
description: Are you ready to face what awaits?
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/261e8608ea0e52ff00b4c615c156a81837cfeef2.png)

## **Important multiplayer information**

The mod **has multiplayer support**, but it may still have some issues.

This mod has **loud sounds**, **flashing images** and **jumpscares**.
This mod can not interact with your PC.
This mod **can crash** your game (can be disabled in the config)



This is a horror mod inspired by The Broken Script and wonderland.jar.
You may still encounter many issues with the mod.
I still have a lot of content planned that will be added in version the second part of the Colliding Dimensions Update (1.2.0). All updates before that will be bugfixes.


<details>
<summary>Currently adds</summary>

- 10 Entities to interact with
- 5 Dimensions to explore
- 15+ Random events that can happen
- 1 Friend?

</details>

Credits:
- Everything is made by me
- Playtesters: NR games 75

Check out The Broken Script here: https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script

Check out wonderland.jar here: https://modrinth.com/mod/wonderland-jar
